description: Bootstrap the Agentic IR Engine node to document the new command pattern.

payload.title: Agentic IR Engine (bin/engine.py)
payload.description: The deterministic Software 1.0 actuator that reads declarative Agentic Intents (IR), permanently logs them to the intent_ledger for lineage/time-travel, and then mutates the graph. This entirely replaces the anti-pattern of LLMs writing ad-hoc Python scripts.
